name: ExtensionEncounter_Diagnosis_Use
title: R5: use
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Encounter.diagnosis.use` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Encounter.diagnosis.use` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Encounter.diagnosis.use` 0..* `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `Encounter.diagnosis.use` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4: `Encounter.diagnosis.use` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Encounter.diagnosis.use` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `Encounter.diagnosis.use` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Encounter.diagnosis.use` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.comment:
